cell-id.name: cell-id

cult-form.doc: the cult form of a belief (organized or folk)

day-length-std.doc: solar day length in standard days, for spinning worlds

fossil-shoreline.name: fossil-shoreline

genesis-note.name: genesis-note

glacial-maximum-era.name: glacial-maximum-era
glacial-maximum-era.doc: standard day of peak ice extent

has-caste.name: has-caste
has-caste.doc: a caste present in a settlement

high-god.name: high-god
high-god.doc: the presiding deity of a ranked pantheon

highest-elevation-m.name: highest-elevation-m
highest-elevation-m.doc: highest globe cell elevation in meters

max-ice-fraction.name: max-ice-fraction
max-ice-fraction.doc: land fraction under ice at the glacial maximum

moon-count.name: moon-count
moon-count.doc: how many moons the anchor world has

moon-period-std.name: moon-period-std
moon-period-std.doc: orbital period of a moon, in standard days

name-gloss.name: name-gloss
name-gloss.doc: the glossed meaning of an entity's generated name

notable-neighbor.name: notable-neighbor
notable-neighbor.doc: a notable neighbor star visible in the night sky

obliquity-degrees.name: obliquity-degrees
obliquity-degrees.doc: axial tilt of the anchor world, in degrees

ocean-fraction.name: ocean-fraction
ocean-fraction.doc: fraction of globe cells below sea level

peopled-by.name: peopled-by
peopled-by.doc: the species that peoples a settlement

plate-count.name: plate-count
plate-count.doc: how many tectonic plates the globe has

refugium.name: refugium
refugium.doc: a place habitable through the glacial maximum

scenario-pin.name: scenario-pin
scenario-pin.doc: an experimenter-supplied pin string conditioning genesis

sentiment.name: sentiment
sentiment.doc: a belief's sentiment (eternal, cyclic, or ambient)

sky-provider.name: sky-provider
sky-provider.doc: which astronomy provider this world uses (constant or generated)

species-activity-cycle.name: species-activity-cycle
species-activity-cycle.doc: when a species is awake: diurnal, nocturnal, crepuscular

species-exotic-manner.name: species-exotic-manner
species-exotic-manner.doc: exotic manner: none, trill, click, ejective

star-class.name: star-class
star-class.doc: the host star's descriptive spectral class

tenet.name: tenet
tenet.doc: the tenet text of a belief

terrain-note.name: terrain-note
terrain-note.doc: a note recorded during tectonic genesis

tidally-locked.name: tidally-locked
tidally-locked.doc: the anchor world is tidally locked (no local day)

phenomenon_kinds.night-star: a fixed star notable in the night sky

blood.name: blood
blood.doc: the circulating fluid of a body

bone.name: bone
bone.doc: the rigid frame of a body

dark.name: dark
dark.doc: the color term for black/dark hues

day.name: day
day.doc: the light half of the day-night cycle

hearth.name: hearth
hearth.doc: the fire at the center of a home

light.name: light
light.doc: the color term for white/light hues

mouth.name: mouth
mouth.doc: the organ of eating and speech

name.name: name
name.doc: a word that identifies one who bears it

night.name: night
night.doc: the dark half of the day-night cycle

shadow.name: shadow
shadow.doc: cast dark, distinct from open gloom

spirit.name: spirit
spirit.doc: a lesser or unseen supernatural presence

star.name: star
star.doc: a fixed point of light in the night sky
